text:
It was a hot sun beating down on the desert floor. Some travelers wanted to take a long caravan journey, exploring the vastness of the African savannah.

In the center of a watering hole, a wise old elephant named Uganda decided it was perfect time for a short getaway.

"Today would not be battle day," he thought. "Today would be my feast day."

He drank from several water tubs.

Then Uganda decided to go hiking on a nearby mountain.

At the peak, he found a berry tree. They're tasty,

He gnawed on them.

Then Uganda went hunting.

Hunting was fun.

He had just about caught a wild goat.

But the goat saw him coming.

Quickly, the goat kicked the elephant straight into orbit and took off into the distance.

Uganda splashed down into the water. Happy that his hunt was successful. Even on the best day, something went wrong.<|endoftext|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|>
